creator: peter@flytrace.com
text:
So, the commit https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/x11-wm/enlightenment/Makefile?id=19a26c8210886d180bb9fe7b278e7ca99e75c9f2 adds an option for 'mixer' module. This option is enabled by default (so mixer module will be built).

If someone needs to use Enlightenment without Pulseaudio - he must rebuild EFL with 'Pulseaudio' option disabled (enabled by default) AND rebuild Enlightenment with 'Mixer module' option disabled (enabled by default).
